hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | head -20; fi

file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then uv run pyright app/ 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.env'; then echo 'BLOCCATO: Modifica diretta di .env non permessa. Aggiorna le variabili manualmente.' >&2; exit 2; fi
